signatureAbility.signatureDescription: The slipperiest quarterbacks are capable of exploding out of the pocket at the slightest sign of trouble. When they enter the zone, their scramble speed is increased.
Passers with this ability have a reduced chance to be impacted by throw penalties caused by defensive pressure while on the run
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all unpressured throws while their feet are set outside the pocket (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all throws outside the numbers (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability receive better blocking support on designed quarterback run plays.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 20+ yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 10-20 yards from the LoS, outside the numbers
Players with this ability are more likely to succeed at and attempt diving catches and swats.
Players with this ability are harder to knock out of The Zone
Players with this ability avoid any ratings penalties associated with playing outside of their primary position
Ballcarriers with this ability have an increased chance to break the first tackle attempt on kick returns
Ballcarriers with this ability are effective at recovering from attempted tackles regardless of their current stamina.
Defenders with this ability have a larger timing window for landing Perfect Hit Sticks
Ballcarriers with this ability have an increased chance to break the first tackle attempt on kick returns
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in any mid-field zone coverage, less than 20 yards from the LoS inside the numbers and 10-20 outside.
Run Stuffers can singlehandedly disrupt an offense. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their win rate and block shed speed against one-on-one run blocks.
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.
Ballcarriers with this ability retain more of their forward momentum during tackles while travelling at high speeds.
